description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a classic single-cutaway design, featuring a glossy black finish on the body and a distinctive metallic or patterned pickguard. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard and dot inlays. The headstock is a traditional shape with six inline tuning pegs, and the bridge is a fixed type with visible saddles and a control plate for the volume and tone knobs. The guitar has two visible pickups, likely single-coil, and a selector switch. The overall construction suggests a robust, high-quality instrument suitable for urban street performances or music venues. The hardware is metallic, contrasting with the dark body and adding a modern touch.
description: A glossy black electric guitar with a single-cutaway body, metallic pickguard, and a light wood neck with six inline tuners. Features include two pickups, a fixed bridge, and a classic headstock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the patterned pickguard, pickups, control plate, and the full face of the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's slim profile, neck length, and the alignment of the headstock and tuners.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the body, neck, and the headstock from behind, with less detail on the hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the body contour, bridge, and the side of the pickguard and control plate.
attribute_headstock_design: Traditional six-inline headstock, light wood, no visible logo, standard contour
